CREATE TABLE test_modulo (a INT, b INT);
SELECT positiveModulo(a, b) AS result, a, b FROM test_modulo WHERE a < 0;
SELECT positiveModulo(a, b) AS result FROM (SELECT a, b FROM test_modulo WHERE b > 0) AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE test_modulo_complex (a INT, b INT, c INT);
SELECT positiveModulo(positiveModulo(a, b), c) AS complex_result FROM test_modulo_complex;
SELECT t1.a, t2.b, positiveModulo(t1.a, t2.b) AS mod_result FROM test_modulo t1 JOIN test_modulo t2 ON t1.a != t2.a;
SELECT avg(positiveModulo(a, b)) FROM test_modulo GROUP BY b;
SELECT positiveModulo((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_modulo WHERE a < 0), 3) AS negative_count_mod;
